# DEVKiTZ™ Dashboard — llms.txt

> 130 Module · 57 Shared Scripts · DkZ Design System v2
> Pfad: C:\DEVKiTZ\01_PROJECTS\01_dashboard\
> Lokal: http://localhost:8080
> Online: https://devkitz.sites
> App: https://web.dkz.app

## Module (130)

Pfad: modules/{modul-name}/index.html
Online: https://devkitz.sites/modules/{modul-name}/

## Shared Scripts (57)

Pfad: shared/

### Kern-System
| Script | Funktion |
|:-------|:---------|
| dkz-navbar.js | Navigation + Hamburger + Sidebar |
| dkz-theme.css | Design System CSS Variables |
| dkz-copilot.js | Chat Widget, 6-Tab UI, Modul-Richter |
| dkz-debug.js | F12 Debug Panel |
| dkz-guide.js | Info-Popups, Tours, Hints |
| dkz-auth.js | 4-Tier Rollen-System |
| dkz-console.js | ESC Console Terminal |
| dkz-headbar.js | Top-Bar mit Breadcrumbs |
| dkz-shortcuts.js | Keyboard Shortcuts |

### Daten
| Script | Funktion |
|:-------|:---------|
| dkz-memory.js | 3-Layer Memory (localStorage/IDB/API) |
| dkz-iceberg.js | Prompt-Versionierung |
| dkz-export.js | JSON/CSV/MD/PDF Export |
| dkz-updater.js | Auto-Update, Sync-Check |
| dkz-compaction.js | Auto-Compaction |

### Intelligence
| Script | Funktion |
|:-------|:---------|
| dkz-james.js | James Score (0-100) |
| dkz-test.js | TestStraße v3 (50+ Checks) |
| dkz-crosslinks.js | Cross-Module Verlinkung |
| dkz-chain-nav.js | Chain Navigation |
| dkz-smart-ui.js | Smart UI Enhancements |
| dkz-a11y.js | Accessibility |
| dkz-connection.js | Provider Connection Panel |
| dkz-prompt-hub.js | Prompt Templates |

## Design System v2

```css
:root {
  --accent: #fa1e4e;
  --accent-soft: rgba(250,30,78,.12);
  --bg: #060608;
  --bg-card: rgba(18,18,24,.85);
  --text-primary: #e8e8ec;
  --text-secondary: #8a8a9a;
  --green: #00ff88;
  --yellow: #ffb800;
  --red: #ff3b5c;
  --blue: #3b82f6;
  --purple: #a855f7;
  --border: #2a2a2e;
  --font-main: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  --radius: 12px;
}
```

## Domain Mapping

| Domain | Pfad | Typ |
|:-------|:-----|:----|
| devkitz.sites | / | GitHub Pages (Primary) |
| devkitz.sites/modules/{name}/ | Module | Auto-Routed |
| web.dkz.app/{name} | Module | Cloudflare Redirect |
| devkitz.eu | → devkitz.sites | Redirect |
